trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Health and medical history > Pain
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "Have you had back pains for more than 3 months?" ~F3571~ was collected from participants who indicated that in the last month they experienced back pain that interfered with their usual activities, as defined by their answers to ~F6159~
